This awesome and classic iced out dragon chain necklace has a subtle neon glowing effect in bright light gaming environments . It's great for the coolest battle aesthetic gamer outfits with how the luxury sparkly icy diamond gems glow and match the color of the mega power on the medal . The jewelry chain features solid dark black metal chains . The amulet / medallion pendant has an awsome neon pink fire / flames dragon.

Exclusive Elaine Neckless

Colar Elaine Exclusivo
Um colar dourado delicado e elegante, feito para alguém especial. Com acabamento em brilho PBR detalhado, ele traz um toque de sofisticação e elegância a qualquer visual. Uma peça simples, porém belíssima, criada para se destacar com estilo.

Fabricado por Exclusive Designs

Exclusive Elaine Necklace
A soft and elegant gold necklace made for someone who means a lot. Crafted with detailed PBR shine, it brings a warm and classy glow to any avatar. A simple yet beautiful piece designed to stand out with style.

Made by Exclusive Designs

Dripping in 2000s luxury, the Gold 2000s Luxury McBling Gyaru Necklace Knuckle is the ultimate trendsetter piece. Imagine stepping out of a pink leopard-print limo, paparazzi flashes bouncing off your vintage glam statement necklace. The bold brass knuckle charm exudes attitude, while the shimmering diamond and twinkling star catch the light, radiating pure McBling energy. Channeling the fierce, over-the-top aesthetic of Y2K icons, this piece is made for those who dare to sparkle, shine, and rule the scene with unapologetic glamour.

items.name: ZiP_Chain ✨
items.description: Make a bold and modern statement with the Zip Chain Necklace, a unique layered piece designed to stand out. Featuring two stylish chains — one in a sleek silver tone and the other in a warm gold finish — this necklace creates a trendy mixed-metal look that elevates any outfit. The centerpiece showcases the word “ZIP” in a clean, contemporary design, symbolizing speed, confidence, and urban style.
